title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 OM-2A Cloud Outsourcing Arrangements and Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
summary: Requires banks to manage cloud outsourcing risks including information security, personal data protection, incident management, business continuity, disaster recovery, access, confidentiality, integrity, data sovereignty, regulatory compliance and auditability.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cloud security and outsourcing controls for conventional banks.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Operational Risk Management Module and Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
